<p align="center">
  <b>Share Your Achievement!</b><br/>
  Spread the word among Codia of your legendary journey! 🧙
</p>

<table>
<tr>

<td>
<p align="center">
  <img alt="QR Code - Share on Twitter" src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=250x250&color=000000&data=https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text={{ socials_text | urlencode }}" /><br/>
  <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/95/Twitter_new_X_logo.png" width="50px" alt="X icon"/><br/>
  Twitter
</p>
</td>

<td>
<p align="center">
  <img alt="QR Code - Share on LinkedIn" src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=250x250&color=0A66C2&data=https://www.linkedin.com/feed/?shareActive=true&text={{ socials_text | urlencode }}" /><br/>
  <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/8/81/LinkedIn_icon.svg" width="50px" alt="LinkedIn icon"/><br/>
  LinkedIn
</p>
</td>

<td>
<p align="center">
  <img alt="QR Code - Share on Twitter" src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=250x250&color=87CEEB&data=https://bsky.app/intent/compose?text={{ socials_text | urlencode }}" /><br/>
  <img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/7a/Bluesky_Logo.svg" width="50px" alt="Bluesky icon"/><br/>
  Bluesky
</p>
</td>

</tr>
</table>
